per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student identifies relevant components like scheduling algorithms and performance metrics but lacks detail in workload selection criteria.
The student uses correct CPU scheduling terminology throughout the framing.
The student specifies goals related to response time, throughput, and fairness but could further clarify how these goals will be achieved and measured.

justification: The student demonstrates partial understanding by identifying key components and using correct terminology, but lacks detail in problem decomposition and goal specification.
